skill.name: caveman
skill.description: Enables an ultra-compressed response style that removes filler, articles, and pleasantries while preserving technical accuracy.
skill.summary: Compress AI replies into terse technical answers without changing code, errors, or required safety warnings.
skill.author: mattpocock

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged markdown backticks as shell execution and text substrings as weak cryptography. Review found no executable scripts, network access, filesystem access, credential handling, or prompt injection attempt. The residual risk is low because the skill changes response style and includes an exception for security warnings and irreversible actions.

low_findings.title: Static Shell Execution Finding Dismissed
low_findings.description: Lines flagged for Ruby or shell backtick execution are markdown examples and quoted text. No command invocation, interpolation, script file, or executable workflow is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged syntax appears inside markdown prose, block quotes, or a fenced SQL example. There is no Ruby code path or shell execution mechanism in the reviewed file.

low_findings.title: Static Weak Cryptography Finding Dismissed
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography findings point to YAML description text and an example heading, not cryptographic algorithms or security code. No evidence found for DES, MD5, SHA1, or other weak cryptographic usage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The relevant lines contain front matter and an example label only. The skill has no crypto implementation, dependency, or instruction to perform cryptographic operations.

low_findings.title: Persistent Terse Style May Reduce Clarity
low_findings.description: The skill asks the assistant to keep compressed mode active across responses until disabled. This is a usability risk for complex tasks, but line 39 explicitly requires clearer wording for security warnings, irreversible actions, and ambiguous multi-step sequences.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The persistence behavior is explicit and could affect readability. The same file also contains a clear safety exception, so this is not a high-severity issue.

content.user_title: Compress AI Replies Without Losing Accuracy
content.value_statement: Long AI replies can waste context and slow technical work. This skill makes Claude, Codex, and Claude Code answer in a compact style while keeping important details intact.
actual_capabilities: Switches to a terse response style when the user asks for caveman mode or shorter answers.
Removes filler words, articles, pleasantries, and unnecessary hedging from responses.
Preserves exact technical terms, code blocks, and quoted error messages.
Uses fragments, abbreviations, and arrows to explain cause and effect quickly.
Temporarily expands for security warnings, irreversible actions, and unclear multi-step instructions.
limitations: It changes communication style only and does not add new tool capabilities.
Compressed language can feel abrupt in collaborative or customer-facing writing.
Complex teaching tasks may need normal mode for clearer explanations.
The user must ask to stop caveman mode when standard prose is preferred.

use_cases.title: Shorten Debugging Replies
use_cases.description: Get compact explanations of likely causes, fixes, and next checks during active debugging.

use_cases.title: Reduce Token Use In Long Sessions
use_cases.description: Keep answers brief during repeated planning, review, and implementation turns.

use_cases.title: Preserve Focus During Reviews
use_cases.description: Receive direct findings and action items without extra setup language or pleasantries.

prompt_templates.title: Start Caveman Mode
prompt_templates.prompt: Use caveman mode for this conversation. Keep answers short but technically accurate.

prompt_templates.title: Compress A Technical Answer
prompt_templates.prompt: Explain this issue in caveman mode. Preserve exact error names and include only the next useful step.

prompt_templates.title: Review With Minimal Prose
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this change in caveman mode. Lead with risks, then fixes, then tests.
prompt_templates.scenario: Code review where speed and signal matter.

prompt_templates.title: Use Terse Mode With Safety Exceptions
prompt_templates.prompt: Use caveman mode unless an action is irreversible, security-sensitive, or ambiguous. Expand only for those parts.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow with explicit safety boundaries.

output_examples.input: Why did my React component render again?
output_examples.output: Inline object prop creates new reference. Memoize prop or move object outside render.
Pool reuses database connections. Less handshake cost. Faster under load.

output_examples.input: Can I delete all user rows?
output_examples.output: Warning: this is irreversible and can destroy production data. Verify backup, target database, and approval first.

best_practices: Use it for debugging, reviews, and repeated technical questions where brevity helps.
Return to normal mode for teaching, stakeholder updates, or sensitive explanations.
Keep exact errors, identifiers, and commands unchanged when asking for compressed replies.
anti_patterns: Do not use it for legal, medical, or financial explanations that need careful context.
Do not compress instructions for irreversible operations unless the safety exception applies.
Do not use it when the audience expects polished, warm, or customer-facing language.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It makes AI responses shorter by removing filler while keeping technical meaning intact.

faq.question: Does it change code output?
faq.answer: No. The skill says code blocks and exact error text should remain unchanged.

faq.question: How do I enable it?
faq.answer: Ask for caveman mode, shorter answers, less tokens, or a similar brief response style.

faq.question: How do I turn it off?
faq.answer: Ask for normal mode or tell the assistant to stop caveman mode.

faq.question: Is it safe for security warnings?
faq.answer: Yes, with limits. The skill instructs the assistant to expand warnings when compressed text could cause mistakes.

faq.question: Which tools does it support?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
